nasb.text: And you shall go in and shut the door behind you and your sons, and pour out into all these vessels, and you shall set aside what is full.”

esv.text: Then go in and shut the door behind yourself and your sons and pour into all these vessels. And when one is full, set it aside.”

cnv.text: 然後回去，把你和你兒子關在家裡，你要把油倒在所有器皿裡面，裝滿了的就放在一邊。”

ccb.text: 然后回家关上门，你和你儿子在屋里把那瓶油倒在所有借来的器皿中，装满的放在一边。”
